name: Livento Group, Inc.
business: Livento Group, through its subsidiary BOXO Productions, engages in movie production and distribution, and offers an AI-driven portfolio management software called Elisee to investment entities.

exposures.sentence: We have internally developed software called Elisee that can capture large amounts of data and create predictive behavior based on client inputs that assist the client in establishing its investment portfolio.
Currently, the Company's primary focus is the activities of BOXO Productions.

catalysts.event: Production of five movies filmed during 2025
catalysts.sentence: We engaged in the production of five movies, that will be filmed during 2025.

catalysts.event: Movie projects expected to be delivered by end of 2025
catalysts.sentence: Our receivables are mainly due movie projects that are expected to be delivered end of 2025.

catalysts.event: Receivables to be fully paid within first 6 months of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We reached agreement wit our customers to fully pay this within first 6 months of 2026.
